name: Mindfulness Practice Journey
description: Develop a deep mindfulness practice with this 28-day program that guides you through various meditation techniques, mindful awareness exercises, and daily reflection practices.

steps.title: Mindfulness Foundations
steps.description: Learn the basics of mindfulness and present-moment awareness
steps.content: Understand what mindfulness is and begin simple awareness exercises

steps.title: Breath Awareness
steps.description: Develop focused attention through breath observation
steps.content: Practice various breathing techniques to anchor your awareness
